goal: Write meaningful tests for critical hooks, create an integration verification script, and validate live Supabase connectivity.
summary: Phase 2 complete: wrote 20 meaningful tests across 3 new test files (auth: 9 tests, useBatches: 6 tests, useUpload: 5 tests) covering signUp/signIn/signOut/OAuth, batch CRUD queries/mutations, and image compression/upload flow. Created scripts/verify-supabase.mjs which connected to the live Supabase project and confirmed all 15 expected tables exist. Full test suite runs 21/21 passing in ~5s. Fixed React act() warnings in useUpload tests.
stepSummaries:
1. Write tests for src/lib/auth.ts (signUp, signIn, signOut patterns) [verified]
  2. Write tests for src/hooks/useBatches.ts query/mutation patterns with mock query client [verified]
  3. Write tests for src/hooks/useUpload.ts image compression and path generation logic [verified]
  4. Create scripts/verify-supabase.mjs that connects to live Supabase and lists tables to confirm schema [verified]
  5. Run full test suite: npm run test [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Steps 1-3 and 5 executed vitest with real test runs. Step 4 executed a Node.js script that made actual HTTPS API calls to the live Supabase backend. No steps were purely proxy-based — all exercised real behavior.
gateVerdicts.evidence: vitest output: 21 passed tests. verify-supabase.mjs output: '✅ 15/15 tables found' with exit code 0.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was 'Tests & Integration Verification'. All 5 steps delivered: 3 test files with 20 meaningful tests, integration script confirming live schema, full suite passing. The combined output proves both test coverage and backend connectivity.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Test files: src/lib/auth.test.ts (9), src/hooks/useBatches.test.tsx (6), src/hooks/useUpload.test.tsx (5). Integration script: scripts/verify-supabase.mjs.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. All planned work in the 5 steps was completed and verified.
